title: Muni jobs judgment to be appealed
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The DA in Knysna is to appeal...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The DA in Knysna is to appeal a High Court judgment involving appointments in Knysna Municipality by the ruling ANC-led coalition in the town in 2022.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The DA in Knysna is to appeal a High Court judgment involving appointments in Knysna Municipality by the ruling ANC-led coalition in the town in 2022."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to the DA's Knysna constituency head, DIon George, the appeal will be made on the grounds that the judgment is incorrect on several points of law."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Western Cape Acting Judge Alan Maher dismissed the DA's application and a partially heard application brought by former DA councillor, now ActionSA member, Julie Lopes in 2022 that questioned the appointments and payment of the eight political appointees.","html":"Western Cape Acting Judge Alan Maher dismissed the DA's application and a partially heard application brought by former DA councillor, now ActionSA member, Julie Lopes in 2022 that questioned the appointments and payment of the eight political appointees."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The second half of the application, and a further application by the DA, were reviewed by Maher, after Judge Robert Henney granted an initial interdict to the DA on 25 November 2022 to stop the payment of salaries to the eight appointees, pending the full hearing of the matter.","html":"The second half of the application, and a further application by the DA, were reviewed by Maher, after Judge Robert Henney granted an initial interdict to the DA on 25 November 2022 to stop the payment of salaries to the eight appointees, pending the full hearing of the matter."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Maher dismissed the DA's applications in a judgment released on Tuesday 6 February.","html":"Maher dismissed the DA's applications in a judgment released on Tuesday 6 February."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Appointments not unlawful","html":"Appointments not unlawful"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In its application the DA argued that the creation and filling of the additional posts was done in a manner that is contrary to the various statutory provisions regulating the creation of municipal staff posts.","html":"In its application the DA argued that the creation and filling of the additional posts was done in a manner that is contrary to the various statutory provisions regulating the creation of municipal staff posts."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Maher said they had failed to show that the conduct \"was unconstitutional, unlawful and inimical to the rule of law\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Cost orders","html":"Cost orders"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The DA also sought personal cost orders against Aubrey Tsengwa (mayor), Alberto Marbi (deputy mayor) and Mncedisi Skosana (speaker) but, said Maher, they failed to make out a case for this relief in the light of findings, based on evidence.","html":"The DA also sought personal cost orders against Aubrey Tsengwa (mayor), Alberto Marbi (deputy mayor) and Mncedisi Skosana (speaker) but, said Maher, they failed to make out a case for this relief in the light of findings, based on evidence."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said no wrongdoing can be imputed to these individuals [the appointees] as they performed in their official capacities.","html":"He said no wrongdoing can be imputed to these individuals [the appointees] as they performed in their official capacities."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"There is no justification to mulct them with a personal cost order, nor to declare that they are personally liable for the alleged irregular and fruitless or wasteful expenditure,\" said Maher."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"No cost order was made between the parties either and Maher said they are responsible for their own costs.","html":"No cost order was made between the parties either and Maher said they are responsible for their own costs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, he did make one cost order relating to the late filing of court papers during a part of the court process, where the respondents sought postponements and the striking of certain content in affidavits.","html":"However, he did make one cost order relating to the late filing of court papers during a part of the court process, where the respondents sought postponements and the striking of certain content in affidavits."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The cost order included \"the cost of two counsel\" against the municipality's speaker, the Knysna Council, the then acting municipal manager, the mayor (Tsengwa), the deputy mayor (Marbi) and Knysna Municipality. Such a cost order is normally seen as being punitive.","html":"The cost order included \"the cost of two counsel\" against the municipality's speaker, the Knysna Council, the then acting municipal manager, the mayor (Tsengwa), the deputy mayor (Marbi) and Knysna Municipality. Such a cost order is normally seen as being punitive."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Mayor Aubrey Tsengwa","html":"Knysna Mayor Aubrey Tsengwa"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Wide-ranging implications","html":"Wide-ranging implications"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If Maher's judgment stands, it will have wide-ranging implications not only for Knysna, but for municipalities throughout South Africa when appointing support staff for political office bearers.","html":"If Maher's judgment stands, it will have wide-ranging implications not only for Knysna, but for municipalities throughout South Africa when appointing support staff for political office bearers."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"It signifies a major shift in the under-standing and execution of such appoint-ments within South African municipalities,\" said Meshé Habana, Patriotic Alliance deputy secretary-general."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The political appointees in September 2022 included the PA's Michele Botha who was at the time appointed chief of staff in Mayor Aubrey Tsengwa's office.","html":"The political appointees in September 2022 included the PA's Michele Botha who was at the time appointed chief of staff in Mayor Aubrey Tsengwa's office."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Michele Botha","html":"Michele Botha"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In response to Maher's judgment, Botha said, \"I applaud the judgment and I am really grateful that justice was served by Judge Maher.","html":"In response to Maher's judgment, Botha said, \"I applaud the judgment and I am really grateful that justice was served by Judge Maher."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This could all have been avoided. As I stated from the beginning and as reported in the media, our appointments were at all times lawful."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"While I can see the purpose behind the DA's political grandstanding, I do find it rather questionable that they wasted the court's precious time with this matter.","html":"\"While I can see the purpose behind the DA's political grandstanding, I do find it rather questionable that they wasted the court's precious time with this matter."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The political point-scoring resulted in Knysna Municipality spending millions of rands defending itself from what was essentially a frivolous claim.","html":"The political point-scoring resulted in Knysna Municipality spending millions of rands defending itself from what was essentially a frivolous claim."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This was a huge waste of ratepayers' money and I hope that the voters hold the DA accountable for that loss.","html":"\"This was a huge waste of ratepayers' money and I hope that the voters hold the DA accountable for that loss."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I'm just really happy for the people that were appointed because we were shamed and humiliated for no reason and we can now go back to work and start serving the community again.\"","html":"\"I'm just really happy for the people that were appointed because we were shamed and humiliated for no reason and we can now go back to work and start serving the community again.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
